leadText: The Relic Gold (Japanese: こだいのきんか Ancient Gold Coin) is a valuable item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Relic Gold serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A gold coin used in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E A gold coin used by an ancient civilization about 3,000 years ago. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A gold coin used by an ancient civilization about three thousand years ago.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.4.1 Distribution 1.4.1.1 As a held item In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price B W B2 W2 X Y N/A N/A * OR AS S M US UM N/A $ 30,000 In the Generation V games, the Relic Gold can be sold to the billionaire maniac in Undella Town for $ 10000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Relic Gold serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.
